title: AI Search
description: One box to search regulations, policies, news, your company documents and assets — with Iris writing a cited answer and a preview drawer.

steps.caption: One box for everything
steps.narration: Search is a single box — ask a question, paste a citation, or just type keywords.

steps.caption: Ask in plain English
steps.narration: Type what you're looking for, the way you'd ask a colleague.

steps.caption: Choose your sources
steps.narration: Choose what to search — regulations, policies, news, your company documents, even your assets.

steps.caption: Narrow with filters
steps.narration: Open Advanced search to narrow by regulator, topic, status or instrument type.

steps.caption: Iris answers, with citations
steps.narration: Iris reads the matching excerpts and writes a grounded answer — every claim cited to its source.

steps.caption: Preview without leaving
steps.narration: Click any citation or result to preview it in a side drawer, then open the full document.

steps.caption: Search your own documents
steps.narration: Switch on Company Docs to search your own SOPs and policies — and pick which folders to look in.

steps.caption: Ranked, with highlights
steps.narration: Your matching documents appear in their own section, with the wording highlighted.

steps.caption: Find any asset
steps.narration: And switch on Assets to find any asset by name or code.
